task: F005 Dashboard — implement GET / controller and Thymeleaf dashboard page for authenticated OAuth2 users
acceptanceCriteria: R1: GET / requires authentication — unauthenticated requests redirect to /login
R2: Model attributes name, email, provider injected from OAuth2User + OAuth2AuthenticationToken
R3: Logout form POSTs to /logout with CSRF auto-injected via th:action
R4: Style consistent with login.html (same font stack, palette, card shadow, border-radius)
R5: Twitter null email renders N/A in template with no NPE
blastRadius: SecurityConfig — GET / now served by DashboardController; anyRequest().authenticated() guards it
CustomOAuth2UserService — principal attributes (name, email) consumed by controller
login.html — logout redirect target after session invalidation
contracts: GET / → 200 with dashboard view when authenticated
